searchInputWidth.requirement: Search input should have min-w-58 (232px) matching filter dropdowns, should not grow to fill space
searchInputWidth.verified: Line 245 in Archive.php: wrapper has 'max-sm:w-full min-w-58 grid' (no grow-1)
searchInputWidth.notes: Search input constrained to same width as filter dropdowns (min-w-58 = 232px). On mobile it goes full width (max-sm:w-full). No longer uses grow-1 class.

searchButtonPosition.requirement: Search icon should be a clickable button positioned at the right inside the input
searchButtonPosition.verified: Lines 254-256 in Archive.php: button type='submit' with justify-self-end, aria-label='Search', positioned via col-1 row-1 grid overlay pattern
searchButtonPosition.notes: Search button is a proper submit button positioned at right edge of input using grid overlay (col-1 row-1 justify-self-end). Input has pr-12 to prevent text overlap. Button has pointer-events-auto and aria-label for accessibility.

dropdownArrowsVisible.requirement: Filter dropdowns and per-page selector should show visible dropdown arrows in dark mode
dropdownArrowsVisible.verified: Lines 129-131 in Archive.css: .archive select override with white-fill arrow SVG data URI
dropdownArrowsVisible.notes: CSS override fixes the global forms.css issue where currentColor in background-image SVG data URIs doesn't work. Archive-specific rule provides white arrow for dark mode context. Per-page select widened from w-16 to w-20 (line 269 PHP) to accommodate arrow without clipping.

perPageColumnAware.requirement: Per-page options should be column-aware: 9/18/27/36/45 for 3 columns, 10/20/30/40/50 for 1/2/4 columns
perPageColumnAware.verified: Lines 80-84 in Archive.php: base calculation (9 for 3 cols, 10 for others), options computed as base * 1 through base * 5. Lines 46-49 in Archive.tsx: matching base/step/min/max computation
perPageColumnAware.notes: PHP computes dropdown options based on maxColumns. TSX computes RangeControl bounds using same logic. When maxColumns changes in editor (lines 96-107 TSX), postsPerPage auto-resets if it doesn't divide evenly by new base.

resourceCardHoverContrast.requirement: Resource card btn-tertiary text should stay charcoal on hover (no dark-on-dark flash)
resourceCardHoverContrast.verified: Lines 144-149 in Archive.css: strong !important overrides for .card-resource .group:hover .btn-tertiary, .group:hover .btn-tertiary:hover, .group:hover .btn-tertiary:focus, .group:focus-within .btn-tertiary
resourceCardHoverContrast.notes: CSS uses !important to fully override btn-tertiary component's dark:hover:text-off-white. All hover/focus states on btn-tertiary force charcoal color when parent group is hovered. Also suppresses hover:underline on btn-tertiary in card context (lines 160-163).

cardBackgroundHover.requirement: Resource and policy card backgrounds should change to accent color on hover
cardBackgroundHover.verified: Resource card (parts/card-resource.php line 15): group-hover:bg-accent group-hover:border-accent group-hover:text-charcoal. Policy card (parts/card-policy.php line 13): same classes
cardBackgroundHover.notes: Both resource and policy cards use group-hover:bg-accent on article element to transition background to accent color on hover. This was already implemented in the previous revision, confirmed working correctly.

verified: Lines 80-84: Column-aware per-page options computation (base = 9 for maxColumns === 3, otherwise 10; options = base * 1 through base * 5)
Line 245: Search wrapper has 'max-sm:w-full min-w-58 grid' (removed grow-1)
Lines 246-257: Search input restructured with button on right (col-1 row-1 grid overlay, button has justify-self-end, input has pr-12)
Line 269: Per-page select widened from 'w-16' to 'w-20' to accommodate dropdown arrow
Lines 129-131: .archive select override with white-fill arrow SVG for dark mode
Lines 144-157: Strong !important overrides for resource and policy card btn-tertiary in group hover context
Lines 160-163: Suppress btn-tertiary underline on hover in card context
Lines 46-49: Column-aware base, step, min, max computation (base = 9 for maxColumns === 3, otherwise 10)
Lines 88-90: postsPerPage RangeControl uses computed min/max/step
Lines 96-107: maxColumns onChange auto-resets postsPerPage if current value doesn't divide evenly by new base

buildVerification.notes: Build passes with only webpack bundle size warnings (informational, no functional impact)

testPage.notes: All 11 archive variations present with DemoContainer wrappers from previous revision

screenshotsVerified.description: Filter bar showing constrained search input width, search button on right, dropdown arrows visible on selects
Resource card with accent background on hover, tag pills visible with inverted styling, btn-tertiary text charcoal (no dark-on-dark contrast issue)
Policy card with full accent fill on hover, tag pills visible, btn-tertiary text charcoal

passedChecks: Search input width constrained to min-w-58 (232px) matching filter dropdowns, does not grow
Search button positioned at right inside input as clickable submit button with aria-label
Dropdown arrows visible on all selects in dark mode (white-fill SVG override)
Per-page select widened to w-20 (80px) to prevent arrow clipping
Per-page options are column-aware: base 9 for 3 columns (9/18/27/36/45), base 10 for 1/2/4 columns (10/20/30/40/50)
TSX RangeControl bounds sync with column-aware base, auto-resets postsPerPage when maxColumns changes
Resource card btn-tertiary stays charcoal on hover with !important overrides (no dark-on-dark flash)
Policy card btn-tertiary stays charcoal on hover with !important overrides
Resource and policy card backgrounds transition to accent color on hover
btn-tertiary hover underline suppressed in card context (entire card is clickable)
